summary: Frontend testing for Lesson Planner PDF export features. Weekly Lesson Planner PDF Export: PASSED - All required elements verified (Header, Info row, Objective, Skills, Day columns with E/C/A checkboxes, DOK Levels row, Activities row with 9 items, Materials row with 7 items, checkboxes with inline styles, MM/DD/YYYY date format). Conversational English Plan Print View: BLOCKED by backend bug - plan_type and Conversational English fields not included in LessonPlanCreate/LessonPlanResponse models.

critical.issue: LessonPlanCreate and LessonPlanResponse models missing plan_type and Conversational English fields (lesson_topic, learning_objectives, materials_text, hook_intro, learning_goal, closure, test_quiz_date, additional_notes)

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test print view because backend doesn't save/return plan_type and Conversational English specific fields

action_items: Add plan_type field to LessonPlanCreate and LessonPlanResponse models in /app/backend/server.py
Add Conversational English fields to backend models: lesson_date, subject, lesson_topic, learning_objectives, materials_text, hook_intro, learning_goal, closure, test_quiz_date, additional_notes
Update create_plan and update_plan endpoints to handle plan_type and Conversational English fields
critical_code_review_comments: Backend models LessonPlanCreate (line 250) and LessonPlanResponse (line 270) are missing plan_type field and all Conversational English specific fields
Frontend loadPlanToForm function was missing plan_type and Conversational English fields - FIXED by testing agent
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/LessonPlanner.js - Added plan_type and Conversational English fields to loadPlanToForm function (lines 319-342)

success_rate.frontend: 50% (Weekly PDF: PASS, Conv English PDF: BLOCKED)

seed_data_creation: Created test plans in lesson_plans collection for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly Lesson Planner PDF export is working correctly with all required elements. Conversational English Plan print view cannot be tested until backend models are updated to include plan_type and Conversational English fields. Frontend fix applied to loadPlanToForm function.

elements_verified.info_row: Unit, Story, Teacher, Grade, Date (MM/DD/YYYY format)
elements_verified.dok_levels_row: L1: Memory, L2: Processing, L3: Strategic, L4: Extended
